scripts.build: bun run --cwd pkgs/contract build && bun run sync-keys-market && bun run --cwd pkgs/shared build && bun run --cwd pkgs/cli build && bun run --cwd pkgs/app build
scripts.build:app: bun run --cwd pkgs/contract build && bun run sync-keys-market && bun run --cwd pkgs/shared build && bun run --cwd pkgs/app build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd pkgs/shared build && bun run --cwd pkgs/app build && bun run --cwd pkgs/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd pkgs/contract build
